creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #5)
> Seems Norm Walsh, who's associated with James Clark, his site is also gone.
Both http://www.jclark.com/jade/ and ftp://ftp.jclark.com/pub/jade/jade-1.2.1.tar.gz fetch just fine for me, could you please revert this?  These tools had been around long enough, good and stable software, other ports depend on them, so we should try to preserve them.  Shall you wish to relinquish maintainership I'd happily pick 'em up.
